blurb: A graceful small understory maple of mountain canyons — slender red-tinged twigs, crisp lobed leaves turning clear yellow in fall, and showy red samaras; happy in the dappled shade few natives tolerate.
sun: Part shade to full sun (takes more shade than most natives)
water: Moderate; prefers some moisture — not for the driest zones
seasons: Lobed leaves (red-tinged in spring) turning clear yellow in fall; showy red samaras; smooth reddish bark
wildlife: Samaras and cover for birds and small mammals; larval host
